identity.name: git_substrate_adapters_v1
identity.title: Amend kernel with first Git-substrate adapter realization slice

objective: Adopt the first Git-substrate adapter realization slice as a kernel review packet, carrying deterministic Git fact and semantic diff projection contracts plus the first normalized realization runner basis.

in_scope: git semantic example and projection manifest
git realization payload and workflow contract
split gix and sem transform surfaces
out_of_scope: broadening beyond the first codex_home git example

constraints: The transport bundle payload must remain byte-identical during packet generation.
The canonical metadata model remains the authority baseline.
Git adapter outputs remain projection-only and do not become semantic authority.
Deterministic Git fact capture must precede semantic diff enrichment.
The normalized manifest/report pattern from cli_extension_v2 remains part of the realization basis.
Packet input and deliverable kinds must remain aligned with the approved ChatGPT packet family registry.
All packet refs must remain repo-relative.
ChatGPT may author packet artifacts only and may not realize them.
assumptions: The codex_home Git-substrate proposal slice is transported into kernel as a validated bundle basis.
The landed metadata metaschema lane remains the upstream semantic authority for this extension profile.
Human review remains authoritative before any kernel adoption beyond the packet lane.
acceptance_criteria: The Git-substrate adapter v1 bundle is included unchanged in the transport bundle.
The packet emits the canonical machine and human artifact family.
Packet input and deliverable roles are traceable to the approved ChatGPT packet family registry.
The packet validates against the live packet schemas and trust boundary.
The packet remains review-only until an authoritative human decision exists.
The bundle includes the split gix and sem transform surfaces plus the unified Git realization runner.
review_criteria: The canonical metadata model remains authoritative.
Git adapter outputs remain derived projection artifacts.
gix remains deterministic Git fact surface and sem remains enrichment-side.
The normalized manifest/report contract remains reusable across CLI and Git slices.
The bundle payload remains unchanged from the codex_home Git-substrate proposal basis.
